import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let s = match io.read_line()
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n_str = match io.read_line()
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    "0"
  end
  let n = match string.parse_int(n_str)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    result = "#{result}#{s}"
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
end
